title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japanese Derby, and Grass Wonder
is set for her clash with El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's tense, knowing that if she can't overcome
her contemporary rivals, defeating the "Beast"
will remain no more than a dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One thing's for sure—we're in for an intense
Derby this year!
